title: Myers-Briggs Personality Test Introduction
prompt: Explain the Myers-Briggs personality test and its four dimensions.
hint: Describe the 16 personality types and the four dimensions: Introversion vs Extroversion, Intuition vs Sensing, Thinking vs Feeling, Judging vs Perceiving.
sample: The Myers-Briggs personality test divides people into 16 types based on four dimensions: Introversion vs Extroversion, Intuition vs Sensing, Thinking vs Feeling, and Judging vs Perceiving.

ja.prompt: Explain the Myers-Briggs personality test and its four dimensions.
ja.hint: Describe the 16 personality types and the four dimensions: Introversion vs Extroversion, Intuition vs Sensing, Thinking vs Feeling, Judging vs Perceiving.
ja.sample: The Myers-Briggs personality test divides people into 16 types based on four dimensions: Introversion vs Extroversion, Intuition vs Sensing, Thinking vs Feeling, and Judging vs Perceiving.

zh.prompt: 解釋邁爾斯-布里格斯性格測試及其四個維度。
zh.hint: 描述16種性格類型及四個維度：內向與外向、直覺與感覺、思考與情感、判斷與知覺。
zh.sample: 邁爾斯-布里格斯性格測試根據四個維度將人分為16種類型：內向與外向、直覺與感覺、思考與情感、判斷與知覺。

title: ENTJ - The Commander
prompt: Describe the characteristics of the ENTJ personality type.
hint: Focus on leadership, vision, accomplishment, and charisma.
sample: ENTJs are natural leaders who excel at creating and executing visions. They are known for their charisma and ability to accomplish anything they set their mind to.

ja.prompt: Describe the characteristics of the ENTJ personality type.
ja.hint: Focus on leadership, vision, accomplishment, and charisma.
ja.sample: ENTJs are natural leaders who excel at creating and executing visions. They are known for their charisma and ability to accomplish anything they set their mind to.

zh.hint: 著重領導力、願景、成就感和魅力。
zh.sample: ENTJ是天生的領導者，擅長創造和執行願景。他們以魅力和完成目標的能力著稱。

title: ISTJ - The Inspector
prompt: Explain the traits of the ISTJ personality type.
hint: Emphasize methodical, thorough, dependable, respect for tradition and law.
sample: ISTJs are methodical and dependable individuals who respect tradition and law. They achieve their goals through steady progress and calm determination.

ja.prompt: Explain the traits of the ISTJ personality type.
ja.hint: Emphasize methodical, thorough, dependable, respect for tradition and law.
ja.sample: ISTJs are methodical and dependable individuals who respect tradition and law. They achieve their goals through steady progress and calm determination.

zh.hint: 強調有條理、徹底、可靠，尊重傳統和法律。
zh.sample: ISTJ是有條理且可靠的人，尊重傳統和法律。他們通過穩步前進和冷靜的決心達成目標。

title: INTJ - The Architect
prompt: Describe the INTJ personality type and their approach to life.
hint: Highlight logic, strategy, high expectations, and success.
sample: INTJs are logical and strategic thinkers who expect excellence from themselves and others. They often achieve great success due to their perfectionism and high standards.

ja.hint: Highlight logic, strategy, high expectations, and success.

zh.prompt: 描述INTJ性格類型及其生活態度。
zh.hint: 強調邏輯、策略、高期望和成功。
zh.sample: INTJ是邏輯且具策略性的思考者，對自己和他人有高標準。他們因完美主義和高標準常常取得巨大成功。

title: INFJ - The Advocate
prompt: Explain the INFJ personality type and their motivations.
hint: Mention their rarity, contradictory traits, and desire to improve the world.
sample: INFJs are rare and complex individuals who combine logic and emotion. They are driven by a strong desire to better humanity and often pursue careers in social work or medicine.

ja.hint: Mention their rarity, contradictory traits, and desire to improve the world.
ja.sample: INFJs are rare and complex individuals who combine logic and emotion. They are driven by a strong desire to better humanity and often pursue careers in social work or medicine.

zh.prompt: 解釋INFJ性格類型及其動機。
zh.hint: 提及其稀有性、矛盾特質及改善世界的願望。
zh.sample: INFJ是稀有且複雜的人，結合邏輯與情感。他們被強烈的改善人類的願望驅使，常從事社會工作或醫療職業。
